title: Roof Plumber Frankston
content:
Roof Plumbing Services in Frankston

Need a roof plumber in Frankston? Sandhurst Roofing has been sorting roof plumbing across the bayside and Mornington Peninsula for over 30 years. No job is too big or too small, from a single leaking downpipe to a full re-gutter, and we will have your roof plumbing sorted as soon as possible. Every job is carried out by a registered, fully licensed and insured roof plumber, so you have peace of mind that the work meets Australian Standards and is done right the first time.

Being right on the bay, Frankston homes face a constant battle with salt-laden air, which is hard on gutters, downpipes and metal fixings. We know exactly what the coast does to a roof and we build for it.

Get a Free Quote!

Common Roof Plumbing Problems We See in Frankston

The biggest issue we see in Frankston is corrosion. The salt air off Port Phillip Bay eats away at older galvanised gutters, downpipes and fasteners, so we are regularly called out to replace guttering that has rusted through, often on the post-war and weatherboard homes the area is known for.

We also see plenty of blocked and overflowing gutters, perished joints and leaks around flashings. In elevated Frankston South the exposure to wind-driven rain adds to the load, while the flatter coastal streets need downpipes and drainage that can shift water quickly.

Gutters, Downpipes & Fascia in Frankston

Gutters, downpipes and fascia keep water away from your home, preventing leaks, rot, sagging and mould. In a coastal suburb like Frankston that job is even more important, so we replace old, rusted guttering with COLORBOND® steel, which stands up far better to the salt air and lasts for years.

Whether it is replacing corroded quad gutters, fitting new fascia capping over rotted timber, or installing fresh downpipes, we do the job properly and clean up after ourselves so your home is left tidy.

Roof Leaks, Flashings & Valley Repairs in Frankston

Leaks in Frankston homes often trace back to failed flashings, rusted valleys or corroded gutters rather than the roof sheets. Our roof plumbers find the real source of the water before fixing it, so the leak is gone for good.

We re-seal and replace flashings, clear and reline valleys, and on tiled roofs we re-bed and repoint ridge capping. With salt accelerating corrosion here, catching leaks early is especially important.

Box Gutters & Rainwater Systems in Frankston

Some of the older and larger Frankston homes, along with commercial buildings, have box gutters that need the right size and fall to cope with heavy rain. We repair and reline box gutters, fit rainheads and overflows, and make sure water cannot back up inside.

We also connect and repair rainwater tanks, charged downpipes and stormwater systems so the water from your roof is drained or stored correctly, well away from your footings.

Storm Damage & Emergency Roof Plumbing in Frankston

Bayside storms can be fierce, and Frankston gets the wind and rain straight off the water. After a storm we are called out for torn flashings, dislodged tiles, fallen downpipes and gutters overwhelmed by heavy rain.

If water is getting into your home, call us straight away. We will make the roof safe and watertight quickly, then explain the permanent repairs needed once conditions allow.

Why Frankston Locals Choose Sandhurst Roofing

Frankston locals choose Sandhurst Roofing because we are quick to respond, do quality work and stand behind it. We are a family-owned, fully licensed and insured business, and every roof plumber on our team is registered.

We give you honest advice, a competitive quote and clear communication from start to finish, so there are never any surprises.

What Our Frankston Roof Plumbing Customers Say

Steve and his team did a fabulous job, I was away working whilst the work was in process, but saw the progress for each of the first two days in the evening and on the third day the final touches were done. The work looks first rate and all of the old gutter was removed very neatly without any drama or mess. It was a pleasure to deal with Steve who was very friendly and accommodating, plus the price was considerably cheaper than that quoted by a rival company. I'm now just waiting for it to rain!

Right from the start, I knew that your company was the right company to go with due to your professionalism, constant communication and keeping us in the loop every step of the way. We will certainly be highly recommending your company and have already done so.

★★★★★ View All Reviews

Frankston Roof Plumbing FAQs

Why do gutters rust so quickly in Frankston?
The salt-laden air off the bay accelerates corrosion, especially on older galvanised guttering. Replacing with COLORBOND® steel gives far better resistance and a much longer life.

Can you replace just the rusted section of gutter?
Sometimes, but if the rest of the run is the same age it is often more cost-effective to replace it all at once. We will give you honest advice on the best option for your home.

Do you handle emergency leaks?
Yes. For leaks and storm damage we prioritise getting your roof watertight as fast as possible. Call 0448 812 800.

Suburbs We Service Near Frankston

As well as Frankston we provide roof plumbing across the bayside and south-east, including Berwick and Cranbourne, plus Frankston South, Seaford, Carrum Downs, Langwarrin and Karingal. Searching for a roof plumber near me? We are local to the whole area.

Get a Free Roof Plumbing Quote in Frankston

Call Steve on 0448 812 800, email info@sandhurstroofing.com.au, or fill out the form below for your free Frankston roof plumbing quote. We will explain exactly what needs doing and give you an honest, fixed price before any work starts.
